firmware.title: The Fairphone (Gen. 6) (QREL.16.48.0) Update
firmware.description:
The Fairphone (Gen. 6) is receiving the newest Android 16 update. This update brings a set of new features and small quality of life improvements. Read along to find out. Here's a quick overview of what to expect from your new device's software build QREL.16.48.0.

Everyday Use & Notifications Two new features are introduced to structure the notifications on your home screen. Bundled notifications groups notifications from the same app to avoid clutter. Notification cooldown limits the sound made by succeeding notifications. Other small changes include a new shortcut for wallet on your homescreen, measurement system customization and new emojis!
Accessibility changes A small change included to improve accessibility is the replacement of high-contrast text with outlined text. This improves readability for users who need a stronger visual contrast.
Security changes Android 16 brings some security improvements, one of them is specifically targeted at spam calls. To protect users from potential scams, installing malicious software via sideloading or granting sensitive permissions is blocked during phone calls.
Other improvements
  • Security patch level: 5th of February, 2026

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.

firmware.title: The Fairphone (Gen. 6) (QREL.16.69.0) Update
firmware.description:
The Fairphone (Gen. 6) software QREL.16.69.0 is available.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved Issues
  • You can now successfully swap the Back and Recent buttons to match your preference
  • Optimized background process management for smoother multitasking
  • Fixed an issue that prevented dismissing apps from the Recents screen while the keyboard was active
  • Fixed a delay in touch input that occasionally occurred after the device had been locked for an extended period
  • Fixed photos occasionally not getting saved after being captured
  • Fixed noise in video recordings captured in quiet environments
  • Fixed an issue where audio playback on bluetooth device remained muted following the completion of a phone call
  • General UI improvements

    • Other improvements
    • Security patch level: 5th of May, 2026
    • Simplified the bootloader unlock process

    More information


    Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

    Please note that data charges may apply.
